---
title: "x-day07"
format: html
---

```{r}

# =============================================================================
# Day 07 – Multiscale Distributions (Zoom Ladder)
# BRA vs EUR | Arrival Punctuality + Delay | 2024–2025
# =============================================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

# ── Colour palette & shared theme ────────────────────────────────────────────
pal_region  <- c("BRA" = "#009C3B", "EUR" = "#2B4EAE")
pal_year    <- c("2024" = "#888888", "2025" = "#111111")
THRESHOLD   <- 80   # % on-time reference line

theme_day07 <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      text                = element_text(family = "sans", color = "#1a1a2e"),
      plot.title          = element_text(size = rel(1.05), face = "bold",
                                         margin = margin(b = 4)),
      plot.subtitle       = element_text(size = rel(0.82), color = "#555577",
                                         margin = margin(b = 8)),
      axis.text           = element_text(size = rel(0.82)),
      axis.title          = element_text(size = rel(0.85)),
      panel.grid.minor    = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y  = element_line(color = "#e8e8f0", linewidth = 0.4),
      panel.grid.major.x  = element_line(color = "#e8e8f0", linewidth = 0.4),
      strip.text          = element_text(face = "bold", size = rel(0.88),
                                         color = "#1a1a2e"),
      strip.background    = element_rect(fill = "#f0f0f8", color = NA),
      legend.position     = "bottom",
      legend.title        = element_text(size = rel(0.82), face = "bold"),
      legend.text         = element_text(size = rel(0.80)),
      plot.background     = element_rect(fill = "#fafafa", color = NA),
      panel.background    = element_rect(fill = "#fafafa", color = NA)
    )
}

# =============================================================================
# DATA – FICTITIOUS BUT REALISTIC
# =============================================================================

# ── Level 1: Network aggregates ───────────────────────────────────────────────
df_network <- tribble(
  ~region, ~year, ~pct_ontime, ~avg_delay_min,
  "BRA",   2024,   74.1,        18.3,
  "BRA",   2025,   76.8,        16.7,
  "EUR",   2024,   82.4,         9.8,
  "EUR",   2025,   83.9,         9.1
) |>
  mutate(year = factor(year))

# ── Level 2: Airport-level summary ───────────────────────────────────────────
set.seed(42)

bra_airports <- tibble(
  region       = "BRA",
  airport_icao = c("SBGR","SBSP","SBBR","SBGL","SBCF",
                   "SBRF","SBSV","SBPA","SBFZ","SBCT",
                   "SBMO","SBVT"),
  airport_name = c("Guarulhos","Congonhas","Brasília","Galeão","Confins",
                   "Recife","Salvador","Porto Alegre","Fortaleza","Curitiba",
                   "Maceió","Vitória"),
  base_ontime  = c(72, 80, 75, 68, 76, 71, 74, 78, 73, 80, 69, 77),
  base_delay   = c(19, 14, 17, 22, 16, 20, 18, 15, 19, 14, 21, 16)
)

eur_airports <- tibble(
  region       = "EUR",
  airport_icao = c("EGLL","LFPG","EDDF","LEMD","LIRF",
                   "EHAM","LEBL","LPPT","EDDM","LSZH",
                   "LOWW","EPWA"),
  airport_name = c("London LHR","Paris CDG","Frankfurt","Madrid","Rome FCO",
                   "Amsterdam","Barcelona","Lisbon","Munich","Zurich",
                   "Vienna","Warsaw"),
  base_ontime  = c(80, 82, 85, 83, 78, 86, 84, 87, 88, 89, 86, 82),
  base_delay   = c(11,  9,  8, 10, 13,  7,  9,  7,  6,  5,  7,  9)
)

# Generate 2023 and 2024 with small realistic variation
make_yearly <- function(df, yr, noise_sd_ot = 2.5, noise_sd_dl = 1.8) {
  df |>
    mutate(
      year        = factor(yr),
      pct_ontime  = pmax(55, pmin(97,
                      base_ontime + rnorm(n(), mean = ifelse(yr == 2024, 1.5, 0),
                                         sd = noise_sd_ot))),
      avg_delay   = pmax(3,
                      base_delay  + rnorm(n(), mean = ifelse(yr == 2024, -0.8, 0),
                                         sd = noise_sd_dl))
    ) |>
    select(-base_ontime, -base_delay)
}

df_airport <- bind_rows(
  make_yearly(bra_airports, 2024),
  make_yearly(bra_airports, 2025),
  make_yearly(eur_airports, 2024),
  make_yearly(eur_airports, 2025)
)

# =============================================================================
# PANEL 1 – NETWORK LEVEL (lollipop)
# =============================================================================

p1 <- ggplot(df_network,
             aes(x = pct_ontime, y = region, color = year, group = region)) +
  # connecting line between years
  geom_line(color = "#ccccdd", linewidth = 1.8, lineend = "round") +
  geom_point(aes(color = year), size = 5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", pct_ontime), color = year),
            nudge_y = 0.28, size = 3.2, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = THRESHOLD, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "#cc3333", linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
  annotate("text", x = THRESHOLD + 0.3, y = 2.45, label = "80% target",
           color = "#cc3333", size = 3, hjust = 0, fontface = "italic") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(60, 95),
                     labels = label_number(suffix = "%")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("2024" = "#aaaaaa", "2025" = "#333355"),
                     name = "Year") +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c("BRA" = "🇧🇷  Brazil", "EUR" = "🇪🇺  Europe")) +
  labs(
    title    = "① Network — Headline Punctuality",
    subtitle = "Network-wide % on-time arrivals · 2024 vs 2025",
    x = "% On-Time Arrivals", y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_day07() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)
  )

# =============================================================================
# PANEL 2 – AIRPORT LEVEL (slope / dot-range)
# =============================================================================

# Wide for slope arrows
df_airport_wide <- df_airport |>
  select(region, airport_icao, airport_name, year, pct_ontime) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = pct_ontime,
              names_prefix = "y") |>
  mutate(
    improved = y2025 >= y2024,
    region_label = if_else(region == "BRA", "🇧🇷  Brazil", "🇪🇺  Europe")
  )

# Reorder airports within each facet by 2024 value
df_airport_wide <- df_airport_wide |>
  group_by(region) |>
  mutate(airport_fct = fct_reorder(airport_icao, y2025)) |>
  ungroup()

# Rebuild long for geom_point overlay
df_airport_long <- df_airport_wide |>
  pivot_longer(c(y2024, y2025), names_to = "year", values_to = "pct_ontime") |>
  mutate(year = recode(year, y2024 = "2024", y2025 = "2025"))

p2 <- ggplot(df_airport_wide,
             aes(y = airport_fct)) +
  # Segment 2023→2024
  geom_segment(aes(x = y2024, xend = y2025,
                   yend = airport_fct,
                   color = region),
               linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.45,
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.12, "cm"), type = "closed")) +
  # 2023 dot (open)
  geom_point(data = df_airport_long |> filter(year == "2024"),
             aes(x = pct_ontime, color = region),
             size = 2.5, shape = 21, fill = "white", stroke = 1.2) +
  # 2024 dot (filled)
  geom_point(data = df_airport_long |> filter(year == "2025"),
             aes(x = pct_ontime, color = region),
             size = 2.5, shape = 16) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = THRESHOLD, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "#cc3333", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~region_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_region, guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(58, 97),
                     labels = label_number(suffix = "%")) +
  labs(
    title    = "② Airport — Where Does the Gap Live?",
    subtitle = "Each airport: ○ 2024 → ● 2025 (arrow shows direction of change)",
    x = "% On-Time Arrivals", y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_day07() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

# =============================================================================
# PANEL 3 – DISTRIBUTION (density / half-violin of airport values)
# =============================================================================

df_dist <- df_airport |>
  mutate(
    region_label = if_else(region == "BRA", "🇧🇷  Brazil", "🇪🇺  Europe"),
    region_label = fct_rev(region_label)   # EUR on top
  )

p3 <- ggplot(df_dist,
             aes(x = pct_ontime, y = region_label,
                 fill = region, color = region)) +
  # Boxplot interior
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(region, year)),
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.55),
               width = 0.35, alpha = 0.25,
               outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.5) +
  # Jitter points coloured by year
  geom_jitter(aes(shape = year, group = interaction(region, year)),
              position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.15,
                                             dodge.width = 0.55),
              size = 2.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = THRESHOLD, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "#cc3333", linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  annotate("text", x = THRESHOLD + 0.4, y = 2.48, label = "80% target",
           color = "#cc3333", size = 2.8, hjust = 0, fontface = "italic") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = pal_region, guide = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_region, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("2023" = 21, "2024" = 19), name = "Year") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(58, 97),
                     labels = label_number(suffix = "%")) +
  labs(
    title    = "③ Distribution — Spread & Tails Across Airports",
    subtitle = "Box: IQR · Points: individual airports · ○ 2024 ● 2025",
    x = "% On-Time Arrivals (airport level)", y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_day07() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11)
  )

# =============================================================================
# COMPOSE – patchwork
# =============================================================================

final_plot <- (p1 / p2 / p3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "BRA–EUR Punctuality: A Multiscale View  |  2024–2025",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "Same KPI · Three levels of zoom — Network → Airport → Distribution\n"
      ),
    caption  = "Day 07 · #30DayChartChallenge · Theme: Distributions",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title    = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", color = "#1a1a2e",
                                   margin = margin(b = 4)),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9,  color = "#666688",
                                   margin = margin(b = 10)),
      plot.caption  = element_text(size = 8,  color = "#999999", hjust = 1),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#fafafa", color = NA)
    )
  ) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 2.2, 1.4), guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# =============================================================================
# SAVE
# =============================================================================

ggsave(
  filename = "./figures/day07_distributions.png",
  plot     = final_plot,
  width    = 12,
  height   = 13,
  dpi      = 200,
  bg       = "#fafafa"
)

message("✅  Saved: day07_distributions.png")

```
